title: EPIC-10 Story 10.3 — Task metadata normalization (version + lifecycle status)
description: Story 10.3 verify-only portion is complete and passed QA (verdict CONCERNS, ready to escalate). This proposal carries the 8 metadata-only edits that are blocked by the L2 deny rule in .claude/settings.json (lines 465-466: Edit/Write on .aiox-core/development/tasks/**), independent of boundary.frameworkProtection. All edits are additive, backward-compatible, parser-safe, and verified verbatim against the current file state. No executable task logic changes (AC7 preserved). Source of truth: docs/architecture/TASK-SCHEMA-NORMALIZATION.md section 6.
rationale: Schema normalization: enforce canonical version format (version: X.Y.Z unquoted) and declare lifecycle status (status: active) on the SDC-critical + rules-referenced task subset. Disproven audit findings (F7 circular-ref, F8 task_id) are documented as verify-only/tech-debt and are NOT part of this proposal.

blockedBy.note: Hard-denied regardless of boundary.frameworkProtection toggle; resolution path is @aiox-master *propose-modification.

Each diff verified verbatim against current file content (Art. IV no-invention)
